raw_consumer_statement:
Issue is with American Express. 

XXXX account was hacked, fradulent charges were made using something called XXXX XXXX but were billed to the American Express credit card on the XXXX account. 

Note - charges went to an XXXX owned company called XXXX. I have never used XXXX XXXX and am not am XXXX XXXX member XXXX XXXX of the fraudulent charges and they indicated the charges would be removed. Attached document shows that XXXX seems to have done this on their side However icharges were still transmitted to American Express and are showing on my Amex account. American Express had indicated they have opened a fraud case but charges are not being removed. Charges are over XXXX  days old I believe American Express not removing the charges are a violation of the Fair Credit Billing Act, Law 15 U.S.C. 1666-1666j
